typography.guidelines: Do NOT use Inter for headings. Keep headings robust and technical. Outfit gives an aeronautical/engineering feel. Manrope for clean numerical data.

layout_spacing.guidelines: Optical alignment rules. Keep UI density high but legible. The interface must resemble a modern flight instrument—clean, white cards on gray backgrounds.

elements: HAL Logo and 'Made in India' Logo (Prominent, Top/Center)
Massive Primary CTA: 'Proceed to Calculation' (bg-primary, rounded-xl, bold text)

calculations_page.header: Bright sky blue background (#1EA7E8), white text 'Helicopter Performance System', gear icon (settings) on right.
calculations_page.airframe_selector: Horizontal scroll or flex grid of 3 cards (Chetak, Cheetah, Cheetal). Active state has a solid 2px blue border and light blue background (#E0F2FE).

inputs_section.title: Operational Inputs
inputs_section.style: Vertical list of white cards. Each card contains an emoji/icon on the left, the input label, a numeric display, and a unit toggle pill (ft/m, °C/°F, kg/lb) aligned right.
inputs_section.multimodal: Tapping input opens a custom drawer/modal with (1) Numpad, (2) Voice Dictation mic icon, (3) Handwriting Canvas.

calculations_page.action_row: Fixed or bottom-heavy layout with a large blue 'Compute Performance' rounded button.

results_page.header: Bright sky blue background (#1EA7E8), white text 'Performance Results', back arrow on left.
results_page.status_banner: Full width banner. If valid: Green (#22C55E) 'Within Limits / Operational Status: Normal'. If invalid: Red (#EF4444) 'Limit Exceeded'.
results_page.metric_cards: 2x2 Grid using 'The Control Room' grid logic. Cards: AUW Capability, Payload, Power Balance, Payload Margin. Include +/- percentages in green/red.
results_page.data_viz: AUW VS ALTITUDE line chart (Recharts). Toggle between Graph and Table view using Lucide icons. Include Current (blue dot) vs Limit (red curve).
results_page.action_row: Bottom sticky bar. Buttons: 'Reset' (White/Ghost), 'Recompute' (Blue Solid), 'Save Report' (Outline), 'Share PDF' (Outline).

settings_config.features: Formulas & defaults editor, SQLite db sync indicator, toggle themes/units globally.

hal_logo.description: HAL India Logo. Use fallback only if Wikimedia URL fails.

made_in_india_logo.description: Made in India Logo. Use fallback only if Wikimedia URL fails.

component_instructions.buttons: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Primary button: hover:bg-[#0284C7] hover:text-white. Ensure adequate contrast.
component_instructions.inputs: Do not use standard HTML <input> without heavy customization. Use custom white cards with rounded-xl, shadow-sm, and internal paddings. Unit toggles should act as segmented controls.
component_instructions.charts: Use Recharts (or an equivalent React library compatible with your environment). Ensure line colors match the guidelines (Blue for current state, Red for limit boundary).
component_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. Standardize stroke-width to 2px. Size should be 20px (w-5 h-5) for standard list items, larger for empty states or banners.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Archetype 4 + Blueprint' color scheme. Do NOT introduce purples or teals.
All interactive elements and form inputs MUST include the 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='compute-performance-button').

The environment specifies React/Tailwind/Shadcn UI. Implement the application using these tools. If expo-sqlite is requested but you are building for the Web, polyfill it gracefully using IndexedDB (e.g., standard localForage or localStorage fallback) to ensure the offline-first requirement is met.

Implement the 'Multi-modal Input' as a drawer/modal that displays 3 tabs or sections when an input is clicked: (1) Standard Numpad, (2) Handwriting Canvas (using an HTML Canvas component capturing strokes and simulating recognition), and (3) Voice input simulation.
For the PDF Export, use a library like 'jspdf' or 'html2canvas' + 'jspdf'. Include the 'HAL Report' heading in the output.
Ensure 'Inter' is NOT used for headings. Apply 'Outfit' for headers and 'Manrope' for body text. Add these via Google Fonts if not present.
The UI must EXACTLY mimic the spacing and layout structure provided. Ensure inputs have the label on the left and unit pills on the right.
Ensure 2x2 metric grids on the results page utilize dense spacing and utilize negative space effectively rather than massive empty cards.
